params.title: Timeline-scoped scene loading for the DOM preview
按时间线按需打包场景
params.subtitle: The editor requests only the scenes referenced by the loaded timeline.

params.sectionTitle: What changed in the preview path

notes.label: Bundle
notes.text: Only referenced scene IDs are included in the generated classic JS bundle.

notes.label: Cache
notes.text: The bridge reuses the same bundle file when the sorted scene ID set is unchanged.

notes.label: Render
notes.text: The DOM preview engine keeps rendering in the same document without an iframe.

params.title: 不同时间线，不同场景包
params.subtitle: The editor no longer depends on a manually maintained static scene-bundle.js.

srt.zh: 编辑器现在会按时间线动态请求场景包。
srt.en: The editor now requests a scene bundle from the loaded timeline.

srt.zh: Bridge 只生成当前时间线实际引用到的场景。
srt.en: The bridge only generates scenes that the current timeline actually references.

srt.zh: 生成后的 classic JS 通过 nf://localhost/generated/... 提供。
srt.en: The generated classic JS is served from nf://localhost/generated/...

srt.zh: 脚本加载完成后，window.__scenes 会在同一文档里可用。
srt.en: After the script loads, window.__scenes is available in the same document.

srt.zh: 随后 previewEngine.loadTimeline() 和 compose(0) 正常执行。
srt.en: Then previewEngine.loadTimeline() and compose(0) run as before.

srt.zh: 这个 demo 时间线现在与 nf-core 场景目录保持一致。
srt.en: This demo timeline now matches the scenes present under nf-core.
